description_long: This is a modern, two-story bungalow with a flat roof and a minimalist architectural style. The exterior features a combination of light gray and beige wall panels, large glass windows, and several outdoor living spaces, including a rooftop terrace with greenery and a poolside patio. The front facade includes a covered carport with space for two vehicles and a small landscaped area with palm trees and shrubs. The rear of the bungalow opens to a rectangular swimming pool, surrounded by lounge chairs and additional greenery. The rooftop is partially enclosed with glass railings and includes seating and potted plants, enhancing the outdoor living experience. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and integration with outdoor elements.
description: A modern, two-story bungalow with a flat roof, rooftop terrace, pool, and large glass windows, featuring minimalist landscaping and outdoor living areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the carport, main entrance, and landscaped area with palm trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rooftop terrace, glass railings, and pool area with lounge chairs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the carport, two parked cars, and rooftop greenery.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the pool, patio, and additional landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and glass doors
